name: RHMZ RS - Republic Hydrometeorological Service of Republika Srpska
operator: Republic Hydrometeorological Service of Republika Srpska (RHMZ RS)
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, hydrological station data, seismological data
cost: partially free (real-time free; historical on request)
description: Republika Srpska entity-level hydrometeorological service providing real-time weather, hydrological station maps, and climate data for the RS entity of Bosnia and Herzegovina.

name: FZZG - Federal Institute for Geology (FBiH)
operator: Federal Institute for Geology (Federalni zavod za geologiju)
dataType: Geological maps (1:100k, 1:200k), hydrogeology, engineering geology, mineral resources, seismotectonic maps
description: Federation of BiH geological institute producing fundamental geological, hydrogeological, engineering-geological and seismotectonic maps, and assessing mineral resources for spatial planning and construction.

name: BHAS - Agency for Statistics of Bosnia and Herzegovina
operator: Agency for Statistics of Bosnia and Herzegovina (BHAS)
dataType: Census data, demographic statistics, economic indicators, environment statistics, agricultural statistics
description: State-level statistics agency coordinating the Federation (FZS) and Republika Srpska (RZSRS) statistical institutes, publishing census geography, demographic, economic and environmental statistics.

name: SDI FBiH - Spatial Data Infrastructure of Federation of BiH
operator: Federal Administration for Geodetic and Real Property Affairs (FGU)
dataType: Metadata catalogue, orthophoto, administrative boundaries, road network, watercourses, address register
description: Federation of BiH spatial data infrastructure geoportal integrating metadata catalogue, web map viewer, and SDI registry as the federation-level INSPIRE-aligned access point for standardised spatial data.

name: AVP Sava - Sava River Basin Water Agency (FBiH)
operator: Agency for the Sava River Basin Water Area (Agencija za vodno podrucje rijeke Save)
dataType: Water permits, flood risk maps, hydrological monitoring, water quality, river basin management plans
cost: partially free (plans/reports free; detailed data on request)
description: Federation of BiH water agency managing the Sava river basin including water permits, flood protection planning, hydrological monitoring and river basin management plans.

name: AVP Jadran - Adriatic Sea Basin Water Agency (FBiH)
operator: Agency for the Adriatic Sea Water Area (Agencija za vodno podrucje Jadranskog mora)
dataType: Hydrological station data, water quality monitoring, flood risk assessment, water permits
cost: partially free (real-time levels free; detailed data on request)
description: Federation of BiH water agency managing the Adriatic Sea basin including real-time water levels from hydrological stations, water quality data, and flood risk assessments via the ISV portal.

name: Federal Forestry Administration (FBiH)
operator: Ministry of Agriculture, Water Management and Forestry of FBiH
dataType: Forest inventory, forest cadastre, forest infrastructure, timber production statistics
cost: partially free (reports free; detailed cadastre data restricted)
description: Federation of BiH forestry directorate collecting forest inventory data, maintaining cadastres of forests and forest land in public ownership, and coordinating cantonal forestry management.

name: Geological Survey of Montenegro
operator: Geological Survey of Montenegro (Geoloski zavod Crne Gore)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, hydrogeology, engineering geology, marine geology
description: Independent state institution and Montenegro's principal geological organisation, producing geological maps, assessing mineral resources, and contributing marine geology data to EMODnet.

name: EPA Montenegro - Environmental Protection Agency
operator: Environmental Protection Agency of Montenegro (Agencija za zastitu zivotne sredine)
dataType: Air quality monitoring, environmental state reports, biodiversity data, protected areas (CGIS bioportal)
description: Montenegro's environmental protection agency providing real-time air quality monitoring, state-of-environment reports, and operating the CGIS bioportal for protected areas information.

name: JP Morsko Dobro - Coastal Zone Management
operator: Public Enterprise for Coastal Zone Management of Montenegro (JP Morsko dobro)
dataType: Bathing water quality monitoring, coastal zone maps, beach infrastructure, maritime domain boundaries
description: Public enterprise managing Montenegro's coastal zone (public maritime domain), monitoring bathing water quality on 110+ public beaches, and providing coastal infrastructure data from offices in Budva, Ulcinj, Bar, Tivat and Herceg Novi.

name: Water Administration of Montenegro - WIS Geoportal
operator: Water Administration of Montenegro (Uprava za vode)
dataType: Dams, weirs, embankments, drainage canals, pumping stations, groundwater monitoring infrastructure
cost: partially free (geoportal layers free; some data on request)
description: Montenegro Water Administration's Water Information System geoportal providing spatial data on water infrastructure including dams, embankments, drainage networks, and groundwater monitoring facilities.

name: Montenegro Seismological Observatory
operator: Seismological Observatory of Montenegro
dataType: Earthquake catalogues, real-time seismic monitoring, accelerometric data, seismic hazard maps
description: Montenegro's seismological observatory operating the national seismic and accelerometric network, providing real-time earthquake monitoring and contributing data to EMSC and FDSN international networks.

name: MONSTAT - Statistical Office of Montenegro
operator: Statistical Office of Montenegro (MONSTAT)
dataType: Census data, demographic statistics, economic indicators, agricultural statistics, environment statistics
description: Montenegro's national statistical office producing official statistics on demographics, economy, agriculture and environment, with municipality-level geographic breakdowns.

name: Montenegro Open Data Portal
operator: Government of Montenegro
dataType: Cross-sector open datasets from 20+ institutions: transport, spatial planning, public administration
description: Montenegro's central government open data catalogue providing 146+ datasets from 20 institutions across 15 thematic areas, relaunched in 2024 after cyberattack, aligned with EU open data standards.

name: Geological Survey of North Macedonia
operator: Geological Survey of the Republic of North Macedonia
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, hydrogeology, engineering geology, geochemistry
description: National geological institute conducting geological research to produce maps and inform policy for physical planning, water supply, agriculture, mining and other public activities.

name: MOEPP - Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning
operator: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning (MOEPP)
dataType: Environmental monitoring, spatial planning data, protected areas, EIA assessments, pollution cadastres
description: North Macedonia's environment and spatial planning ministry overseeing environmental monitoring, spatial data infrastructure coordination, protected areas management and environmental impact assessments.

name: Air Quality Portal of North Macedonia
operator: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning (MOEPP)
dataType: Real-time air quality index, PM10, PM2.5, NO2, SO2, O3, CO concentrations
description: Real-time air quality monitoring portal operated by MOEPP displaying hourly pollutant concentrations from 22 automatic monitoring stations across North Macedonia with daily and monthly reports.

name: MakStat - State Statistical Office Database
operator: State Statistical Office of the Republic of North Macedonia
dataType: Census data, demographics, economic indicators, agricultural statistics, environment statistics by NUTS regions
description: North Macedonia's official statistical database providing free multi-thematic data at various territorial levels according to NUTS nomenclature, with API access and multiple export formats.

name: JP Makedonski Sumi - Public Enterprise Macedonian Forests
operator: Public Enterprise Macedonian Forests (JP Makedonski Sumi)
dataType: Forest inventory, timber production, forest management plans, forest area by type/age/health
cost: partially free (reports free; detailed data restricted)
description: State-owned enterprise managing approximately 90% of North Macedonia's forests through 30 regional forestry units, maintaining forest inventory data covering 1,001,490 hectares of forest area.

name: RFMC - Regional Fire Monitoring Centre
operator: Regional Fire Monitoring Centre / Crisis Management Centre of North Macedonia
dataType: Forest fire detection, fire risk maps, satellite-based fire monitoring, burned area assessment
description: North Macedonia-based fire monitoring centre providing near real-time forest fire detection and risk assessment using satellite data, serving the Western Balkans region through JICA-supported MKFFIS system.

name: INSTAT GeoData Hub
operator: Institute of Statistics of Albania (INSTAT)
dataType: Census geography, demographic maps, population density, socioeconomic indicators by municipality
formats: CSV, KML, GeoJSON, GeoTIFF, PNG, Shapefile
description: INSTAT's dedicated geospatial data hub enabling discovery, analysis and download of census and socioeconomic data with thematic mapping, charts, and OGC-compliant web services.

name: AKBN - National Agency of Natural Resources
operator: National Agency of Natural Resources (AKBN - Agjencia Kombetare e Burimeve Natyrore)
dataType: Mining permits with coordinates, petroleum exploration blocks, energy production data, mineral resource maps
cost: partially free (permit maps free; detailed data on request)
description: Albania's natural resources agency supervising mining, petroleum and energy sectors, providing a GIS-based portal with real-time data on licensed and free mining zones for public transparency.

name: AKM - National Environment Agency of Albania
operator: National Environment Agency (AKM - Agjencia Kombetare e Mjedisit)
dataType: Climate data, air quality monitoring, environmental impact assessments, environmental state reports
description: Albania's national environment agency responsible for climate data collection, environmental monitoring, environmental impact assessments, and compliance inspection under the Ministry of Tourism and Environment.

name: AKP - National Forestry Agency of Albania
operator: National Forestry Agency (AKP - Agjencia Kombetare e Pyjeve)
dataType: National forest and pasture inventory (IKPK), forest types, forest health, land cover categories
cost: partially free (summary data free; detailed inventory on request)
description: Albania's national forestry agency managing the National Forest and Pasture Inventory with data on forest structure, types, naturalness, age classes, health status, and land cover categories.

name: AKZM - National Agency of Protected Areas
operator: National Agency of Protected Areas (AKZM - Agjencia Kombetare e Zonave te Mbrojtura)
dataType: Protected area boundaries, management plans, biodiversity data, zoning maps
formats: PDF, maps (boundaries also on ASIG geoportal)
description: Albania's protected areas agency managing approximately 21.3% of national territory as protected areas, providing boundaries, management plans and zoning data integrated with the ASIG geoportal.

name: Albania Open Data Portal
operator: Government of Albania
dataType: Cross-sector open datasets: public spending, procurement, demographics, transport, environment
description: Albania's central government open data portal providing DCAT-AP compliant datasets from public institutions with SPARQL query support, aligned with EU open data standards.
